spec.emotional_state: hopeful, made some progress on a goal
spec.label: D01_coldstart_u01_pr

profile.personality: curious but reserved; thinks before replying; warms up after a few turns

transcript.content: Hi Priyansh, I'm Miss Maya. I'm happy you came to practice English with me today. How was your day so far?
It was okay, thanks. I worked on a project and watched a Bollywood movie in the evening. How was your day?
You watched a movie? Which one? I just had a quiet day, grading some students' work. My chai helped me stay focused. What Bollywood movie did you watch?
Jab We Met" — it's a good story about friendship. I relate to the characters a bit. You, ever watched it?
"Jab We Met" is a classic! I love the way it shows how people change each other's lives. Your English is very clear. I'm glad you enjoy the movie. Did you watch it for the story or the music?
Mainly for the story, but some songs are catchy. The music is good too, of course. Have you seen it?
You said it perfectly — "some songs are catchy." Good English! I watched it a few years back. The music is a big part of Bollywood for me. What’s your favorite song from the movie?
Zindagi Kaisi Yeh" is my favorite — it's emotional and really fits the story. The music director did a great job. Do you like sad songs?
"Zindagi Kaisi Yeh" is a beautiful song. I agree, it fits the story well. Sad songs touch the heart. I enjoy them, yes. What makes a song sad for you? The lyrics? The music?
Both lyrics and music, I think. When the tune is soft and the words feel meaningful, it hits you. Like in that song — the situation in the movie makes it even sadder. Have you felt that before?
You said "it hits you" — very natural expression! Yes, I feel that. When music and story match, it moves me. Which song has made you feel like that recently?
Recently, I listened to a Hindi song called "Ae Watan." The lyrics are about love for the country, but it's very emotional. It made me think about a lot of things. Have you heard it?
"Ae Watan" is a powerful song. I have heard it — it brings pride and emotion. You said "made me think about a lot of things" — very smooth! Do you often listen to songs with deep meanings?
Sometimes, but I’m starting to enjoy them more. Maybe because I understand Hindi well, the meaning connects better now. Thanks for the chat, Maya — I should get back to work. Talk later!
You said "connect better now" — very natural! I'm glad we could chat. Work calls — I understand! Talk soon, Priyansh. Tell me if you want to discuss "Ae Watan" more later.
